news.title: Roche unpacks death imbalance, secondary endpoints in phase 3 multiple sclerosis trials

news.title: Racing toward first FDA nod for autoimmune CAR-T, Kyverna bolsters lead with full SPS dataset

news.title: AACR: Revolution sees pancreatic cancer win as 'tip of the iceberg' as RAS wave rises

news.title: Fierce Biotech Layoff Tracker 2026: Replimune reduces staff; Astellas shutters cell therapy site
news.snippet: As always, if you know of layoffs occurring at a biotech, please reach out to the Fierce Biotech editorial team.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Tortugas' $106M beachhead; Ray shines with $125M
news.snippet: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: Pfizer's strategy head Andrew Baum to step down following brief tenure: reports
news.snippet: Pfizer's chief strategy and innovation officer Andrew Baum is stepping down merely two years into the role, according to reports.

news.title: Tortugas comes out of its shell with $106M to fund 4 phase 2-stage neuro drugs licensed from Asia
news.snippet: A pair of Sage veterans has launched a neurology-focused startup armed with $106 million and a clinical-stage pipeline of assets licensed from Eisai and Hansoh.

news.title: Ray Therapeutics shines a light on $125M round targeting genetic eye therapy
news.snippet: Gene therapy biotech Ray Therapeutics has announced the closing of a $125 million series B financing to support the company’s vision restoration candidates for patients with retinal degeneration.

news.title: In a Merck Litespark shocker, Welireg triplet misses the mark in first-line kidney cancer
news.snippet: After prevailing in two kidney cancer trials in the refractory and early-stage settings, Merck & Co.’s blockbuster prospect Welireg surprisingly failed to ignite hope as a first-line treatment.

news.title: Pulnovo Medical scores $100M in finance round led by Medtronic
news.snippet: Pulnovo Medical, a Chinese medtech focused on therapies that target pulmonary hypertension and heart failure, hauled in $100 million in an oversubscribed finance round led by Medtronic.

news.title: Foundation Medicine expands Bristol Myers Squibb collaboration with new diagnostic target
news.snippet: Roche’s Foundation Medicine is deepening its longstanding ties with Bristol Myers Squibb as the companies team up on a new target.

news.title: With $50M from Flagship Pioneering, Serif strives to write new chapter for DNA medicines
news.snippet: With a few chemical tweaks and some dutiful protein partners, a new biotech from Flagship Pioneering thinks it has cracked the code to turn DNA into a brand-new class of therapeutics.

news.title: Gilead loosens ties to Arcus after TIGIT dream finally ends in phase 3 failure
news.snippet: Gilead and Arcus' domvanalimab, one of the last anti-TIGIT antibodies still standing, has failed another trial—leading Gilead to pull further away from their once wide-ranging collaboration.

news.title: Replimune ramps up layoffs to cover 60% of workforce amid ongoing fallout of FDA rejection
news.snippet: Replimune is saying goodbye to a further 161 staffers across two Massachusetts sites.

news.title: AACR: Endeavoring to go global, Zai Lab offers reality check on China’s biotech ascent

news.title: Merck amps up presence in HIV treatment market with FDA nod for novel combo pill Idvynso
news.snippet: The once-daily HIV treatment regimen offers a new mechanism of action in the HIV treatment market.

news.title: The Oral GLP-1 Tracker: Following the launch trajectories of Lilly’s Foundayo, Novo’s Wegovy pill

news.title: Pfizer's strategy head Andrew Baum to step down following brief tenure: reports
news.snippet: Pfizer's chief strategy and innovation officer Andrew Baum is stepping down merely two years into the role, according to reports.

news.title: AstraZeneca eyes 5th Ultomiris indication after kidney disease trial win
news.snippet: In a phase 3 trial in the rare kidney disease IgAN, AstraZeneca said its Ultomiris delivered a clinically meaningful and statistically significant reduction in protein from the urine after 34 weeks.

news.title: Roche’s Enspryng cuts relapse risk by 68% in rare neuroinflammatory disease

news.title: In a Merck Litespark shocker, Welireg triplet misses the mark in first-line kidney cancer
news.snippet: After prevailing in two kidney cancer trials in the refractory and early-stage settings, Merck & Co.’s blockbuster prospect Welireg surprisingly failed to ignite hope as a first-line treatment.

news.title: UCB partners with Myasthenia Gravis Foundation of America on meal program targeting nutrition deserts
news.snippet: UCB is teaming up with the Myasthenia Gravis Foundation of America and Factor Meals to provide premade meals to 250 families affected by myasthenia gravis, a chronic disease that can cause muscle weak

news.title: Replimune ramps up layoffs to cover 60% of workforce amid ongoing fallout of FDA rejection
news.snippet: Replimune is saying goodbye to a further 161 staffers across two Massachusetts sites.

news.title: Sanofi touts tolerability of COVID shot Nuvaxovid in head-to-head trial vs. Moderna's mNexspike
news.snippet: Sanofi’s protein-based vaccine Nuvaxovid has topped Moderna’s next-generation messenger RNA shot mNexspike in a head-to-head trial assessing the tolerability of the two COVID vaccines.

news.title: Regulatory tracker: GSK's multiple myeloma ADC Blenrep expands to China
news.snippet: In this tracker, Fierce Pharma is recording the regulatory progress of in-market products, including expansions into key geographies and new indications. Some of these updates may not meet the bar for

news.title: Biovac nets $108M finance package to build Africa’s first fully integrated vaccine plant
news.snippet: Biovac has secured a $108.3 million financing package that will allow the South African pharma company to build the continent’s first end-to-end, multi-vaccine production plant.

news.title: Genentech shifts Hemlibra marketing focus to patient stories as competition approaches
news.snippet: Genentech has launched the “Life Doesn’t Wait” campaign to mark World Hemophilia Day, dialing up its focus on patient stories ahead of the expected intensification of competition in the hemophilia A m

news.title: Neurogene hires new CCO as it eyes commercial future for its Rett gene therapy
news.snippet: Neurogene is looking to make the leap from a clinical biotech to a commercial biopharma with its lead gene therapy and has hired an industry veteran to take the reins.

news.title: Biogen bullish on America with Durham Bulls team up
news.snippet: Biogen and Minor League Baseball’s Durham Bulls are joining forces to celebrate “America 250” in the Triangle Community.

news.title: Bayer falls short in bid to block J&J’s survival claims in prostate cancer clash
news.snippet: In a blow to Bayer, a U.S. federal judge in Manhattan has said he will not block Johnson & Johnson’s survival claims on a key prostate cancer drug.

news.title: STAT+: With successful trials, Roche takes its MS drug to regulators, but safety questions loom
news.snippet: The Swiss drugmaker Roche presented the latest data for its experimental multiple sclerosis drug, setting the stage for the company to seek approval.

news.title: STAT+: From Revolution Medicines, more strong data on KRAS drug and a glimpse of a ‘novel class’ beyond it
news.snippet: A company that is changing the outlook on pancreatic cancer has more promising data for treatments near-term and for a generation beyond.

news.title: STAT+: Kyverna Therapeutics plans to submit cell therapy for stiff person syndrome for FDA approval
news.snippet: A one-time cell therapy from Kyverna Therapeutics for stiff person syndrome, a rare disease, improved mobility and reduced disabilities in a late-stage trial.

news.title: STAT+: At AACR, more strong results for Revolution Medicine’s KRAS drug, plus assurance from NCI’s director
news.snippet: At AACR, Revolution Medicines presented more eye-catching data about its KRAS-targeting treatment, and Anthony Letai declared the state of cancer research steady.

news.title: STAT+: Insurers refuse to join Medicare pilot offering weight loss drugs to seniors at steep discount
news.snippet: Health insurers would have likely faced a financial strain by participating in the Medicare pilot.

news.title: Flu vaccine no longer mandated for U.S. troops, defense secretary says
news.snippet: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announced Tuesday that the U.S. military will no longer require all American troops to get the flu vaccine.

news.title: Judge postpones OxyContin-maker Purdue Pharma’s sentencing to let opioid victims attend in person
news.snippet: A judge is expected to sentence OxyContin maker Purdue Pharma to forfeit $225 million to the Justice Department on Tuesday, clearing the way for the company to finalize a settlement…

news.title: STAT+: Kelonia Therapeutics’ road from floundering to $3 billion
news.snippet: BioAge bets on inflammation, a short Pfizer career, and more biotech news from The Readout

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a Purdue Pharma settlement, a setback for Merck and Eisai, and more
news.snippet: A U.S. judge is expected to direct Purdue Pharma to forfeit $225 million to the Justice Department, clearing the way for a massive settlement

news.title: Pregnancy vaccine reduces baby hospital admissions for RSV by 80%
news.snippet: A study confirms the vaccine gives excellent protection for babies against life-threatening chest infections.

news.title: 'Why is the NHS funding students if it can't give them jobs?' Anger over recruitment freeze
news.snippet: Dozens of midwifery, physiotherapy and nursing students contact BBC over fears they won't get jobs.

news.title: Mental health support to be offered to people with diabetes in UK first
news.snippet: People with diabetes are twice as likely to have depression, a charity backing tailored support says.

news.title: Three young people contract meningitis in Weymouth
news.snippet: Young people are to be offered the MenB vaccine after three cases of meningitis were confirmed.

news.title: Lawmakers clash with RFK Jr as he shifts focus away from vaccines
news.snippet: During a three-hour hearing, the US health secretary tried to focus on chronic disease while being pressed on vaccines.

news.title: Breakthrough £90,000 Alzheimer's drugs unlikely to benefit patients, report suggests
news.snippet: A major review has provoked a backlash after concluding the medicines provide too little benefit to be noticed.

news.title: What is the UK Covid inquiry and how does it work?
news.snippet: The fourth report from the inquiry into the pandemic said the vaccine roll-out was an "extraordinary feat".
